entries.term: When Agents Commit Too Soon
entries.product_direction: 面向 Agent 开发者的过早决策检测与纠偏工具，在证据不足时阻止 Agent 过早锁定行动方案
entries.suggested_headline: Stop AI Agents From Committing Too Soon — Explore Before You Act
target_users: 企业 LLM 应用团队

entries.term: Go-with-the-Track: Video Compositing and Motion Control with Point Tracking
entries.product_direction: 面向视频创作者的点追踪合成工具，用结构化运动控制替代易出 bug 的手动 keyframe 调参
entries.suggested_headline: Composite Video With Point Tracking — Stable Motion Control Without the Bugs

entries.term: Go-with-the-Track
entries.product_direction: 面向内容团队的轻量视频合成与运动控制工具，降低点追踪工作流的学习曲线与稳定性问题
entries.suggested_headline: Point-Tracking Video Compositing Made Simple — Less Frustration, More Control

entries.term: Libretto: Giving LLM Agents a Sense of Musical Structure
entries.product_direction: 面向音乐创作 AI 的结构感知编排层，让 Agent 理解曲式、段落与节奏而非盲目生成音符
entries.suggested_headline: Give Your AI Agents a Sense of Musical Structure — Compose With Real Form

entries.term: A Verifiable Search Is Not a Learnable Chain-of-Thought
entries.product_direction: 面向 Agent 开发者的可验证搜索框架，用环境原生验证替代不可学习的 CoT 幻觉链
entries.suggested_headline: Verifiable Search for AI Agents — Results You Can Actually Check
target_users: 需要可审计推理的企业 AI 团队

entries.term: Capable but Careless
entries.product_direction: 面向 computer-use Agent 运营方的情境完整性合规层，防止 Agent 越权访问敏感信息
entries.suggested_headline: Computer-Use Agents That Respect Contextual Integrity — Know What Not to Touch
target_users: 企业 AI 安全团队

entries.term: Toward Open Weight Models Without Risks: Separating Public and Private Capabilities in LLMs
entries.product_direction: 面向模型发布者的开放权重风险分离平台，将公开能力与私有敏感能力解耦部署
entries.suggested_headline: Ship Open-Weight Models Without Leaking Private Capabilities
target_users: 注重合规的 ML 平台

entries.term: Toward Open Weight Models Without Risks
